title: CIP-30-DeepLink wallet registry
description: Advisory list of Cardano wallets that implement CIP-30-DeepLink. Mirrors the CIP-10 registry-file pattern. The authoritative runtime source of a wallet's protocol commitments is the vendor-attestation manifest at /.well-known/cip30dl-attestation.json; this registry exists purely as a human-curated convenience for dApps that want a static wallet picker.

id.description: Lowercase ASCII identifier for the wallet. Used as the per-wallet scheme suffix and as the path discriminator in the custom-scheme fallback URI (cip30dl-<id>:/v1/...). Must be unique across the registry.

scheme.description: Per-wallet custom-scheme fallback identifier, of the form cip30dl-<id>. Per-wallet schemes prevent shared-scheme hijack: any installed app can register a bare cip30dl: scheme and intercept fallback URIs intended for a specific wallet; per-wallet schemes scope the hijack risk to wallets that share an installed namespace.

https.description: Wallet vendor's Universal Link / App Link prefix. MUST be HTTPS, MUST end with a trailing slash, MUST claim the path '/cip30dl/v1/' via the wallet's apple-app-site-association (iOS) and /.well-known/assetlinks.json (Android) when AASA/App-Links are published per the v=2 mandate.
